span.p:
Bare sentinel: ItemError
((uint64_t)LMD_TYPE_ERROR << 56)
low 56 bits = 0 (no payload)

span.p:
Boxed pointer: err2it(LambdaError*)
low 56 bits = LambdaError* heap pointer

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
no rich payload
check context->last_error
for code + message + trace

span.p:
err_create (arena, is_heap=false)
err_create_heap (GC, is_heap=true)
err_createf (1024B buffer)

span.p:
err_free frees non-heap;
no-op for is_heap (GC owns)
